zh.title: 以太坊/美元技术分析：短期横盘震荡，潜在上行支撑
zh.content:
当前ETH/USD价格在2126.76附近徘徊，较24小时微跌0.07%，短期走势表现出横盘整理的特征。价格紧贴20日简单移动平均线(SMA20) 2113.93，上方压力位位于2133.69的日内高点，短期趋势尚未明朗，但多空力量呈现均衡状态。

MACD指标当前值为7.017343，尽管信号线数据缺失，但MACD仍显示潜在买入动能，暗示短线可能存在反弹机会。由于RSI数据不可用，无法完全判断超买或超卖情况，但结合均线位置，市场整体仍偏中性。

支撑位主要集中在SMA20 2113附近及日内低点2126.42，若跌破则可能触发进一步下行压力。阻力位则在2133-2140区域，多次试探未能有效突破将形成短期压制。交易者可关注价格对支撑位的反应，逢低谨慎布局。

综合来看，ETH/USD短期以横盘震荡为主，短线交易建议偏向区间操作，逢低买入、接近阻力位可考虑减仓或短线获利，严格设置止损以应对突发波动。中线投资者则需等待趋势确认再加仓。

en.title: Ethereum vs US Dollar Technical Analysis
en.content:
Ethereum is trading near 2126.76, holding slightly above its 20-day simple moving average at 2113.93, which suggests the broader short-term structure remains cautiously bullish despite muted momentum. Price action has stayed compressed between 2126 and 2134 during the latest session, indicating consolidation after recent upside movement. The narrow intraday range and marginal 24-hour decline of 0.07% imply traders are waiting for a stronger catalyst before committing to a decisive directional move.

The MACD reading of 7.02 continues to favor bullish momentum, showing that buying pressure has not fully faded even as price activity slows. However, the absence of a confirmed signal line crossover limits conviction and suggests momentum may be flattening rather than accelerating. RSI data is unavailable, but current market behavior reflects a neutral-to-slightly-positive sentiment profile. As long as ETH remains above the 2110-2115 region, buyers are likely to maintain near-term control of the trend.

Immediate support is developing around 2120 and then near the SMA zone at 2113. A break below that level could expose Ethereum to a deeper retracement toward 2095 or even psychological support near 2080. On the upside, resistance remains clustered around 2135, with a stronger breakout barrier near 2150. A sustained move above 2150 would likely improve bullish sentiment significantly and could trigger momentum-driven buying toward higher short-term targets.

From a trading perspective, short-term participants may consider buying controlled pullbacks toward the 2115 support region while maintaining disciplined stop-loss placement below 2095. Momentum traders could also watch for a confirmed breakout above 2135 before entering continuation positions. Conservative traders may prefer to remain patient until volatility expands and direction becomes clearer. Current conditions favor range-trading strategies more than aggressive trend-following positions until a stronger breakout develops.
